payload.content:
Learn from these two wrong-then-right contrasts:

Example 1 (partial-scan failure) — Table: Runner,Time; Ada,12.1; Ben,11.4; Cyd,11.9; Dan,10.8. Q: Who was fastest? Wrong: Ben (stopped at first low value). Right: Scan all rows — Dan at 10.8 is the minimum. A: Dan

Example 2 (wrong-column failure) — Table: Book,Author,Year; A,Smith,1999; B,Jones,2004. Q: Who wrote book B? Wrong: 2004 (picked the Year column). Right: The question asks for the author of B; look at the Author column. A: Jones
